title: Jedilore
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Jedilore''' was a street in [[Xakrea]] on [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]]. There was a clothes shop on the corner where the road met [[Pontrin]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Interlude at Darkknell|book=Tales from the New Republic}} {{Mo}}
